title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Sports Authority India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Sports Authority India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!
